## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest source` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check source` is clean
- [ ] Docs / README / CHANGELOG updated if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or personal data added (recipes included)
- [ ] New recipes (if any) target public sites and respect their Terms of Service
